name: Almedio Inc.
summary: Almedio Inc. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of test tapes and test discs in Japan. The company is also involved in the manufacture and sale of measuring instruments for optical media; sub-materials for electronic parts, refractory materials, and related products; industrial equipment for the optical disc drives; and nano material products comprising carbon nano and micro fiber for reinforcement and conductivity, and synthetic graphene powder, as well as in selling optical disc archive solutions. In addition, it provides attestation tests for the DVD verification laboratory; and tests for various kinds of discs. The company was formerly known as A-BEX and changed its name to Almedio Inc. in March 1997. Almedio Inc. was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Kunitachi, Japan.
